lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Snake, keep your eyes open. The mission depends on stealth.

localizedText.en: Snake, keep your eyes open. The mission depends on stealth.
localizedText.fr: Snake, ici Campbell. Est-ce que tu me reçois ?

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood. I’ll keep moving.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Use the Codec if you need mission support or a reminder of the objective.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Snake, this is a priority call. Check your surroundings before advancing.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: What am I looking for?

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Security patrols, cameras, and locked access points. Your Codec memory will be updated as contacts are discovered.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Snake, your first objective is simple: enter the dock area and recover a Level 1 keycard.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: And after that?

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Reach the cargo elevator. Avoid unnecessary alerts. This is still an infiltration mission.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Snake, you’ve been spotted. Break line of sight and find cover.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: They’re already moving.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Crouching reduces your profile. If you can neutralize a guard quietly, do it before reinforcements arrive.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Good. That keycard should get you through the first security lock.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Where’s the extraction point?

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Proceed to the cargo elevator at the far end of the dock.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Objective complete. The Side Ops prototype is responding correctly.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: So the Codec integration works.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: For now, yes. Next step: enemies, cameras, weapons, and rank calculation.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: Snake, your simulation state is stored locally in this build.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: So the mission data stays on this machine?

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: Exactly. Your memory contacts, history and settings are saved by the local save engine.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, security systems usually follow simple patterns. Watch cameras before you move.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Any way to shut them down?

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Later builds can add chaff grenades, terminals, and destructible camera nodes.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Snake, if your condition drops too low, use a ration before engaging again.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I can still move.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Movement isn’t the same as combat readiness. Stay alive first.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: Snake, weapons should be used with discipline. Noise changes the entire tactical situation.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: So keep it quiet unless I have no choice.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: Exactly. Future Side Ops passes should separate lethal, non-lethal, explosive and electronic tools.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: Snake, speed is useful, but rhythm wins infiltration. Observe, then move.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll keep that in mind.

lines.speaker: meryl
lines.text: Snake, some routes are safer if you move low and wait for patrols to turn.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Copy that.

lines.speaker: unknown
lines.text: Snake... this channel is not secure.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: unknown
lines.text: A warning is all you need for now.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, the chaff is disrupting local electronics. Cameras should lose their lock for a short window.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Then I move while the signal is dirty.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Exactly. It will not last long, so do not waste the opening.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: That camera node is down. Any patrol nearby may still react to the noise, so keep moving.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: One less eye on the route.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Good work. A non-lethal takedown keeps the mission cleaner than an open firefight.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: As long as he stays down long enough.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Do not count on the base staying quiet forever. Keep advancing.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Snake, your vitals just collapsed. The simulation is marking this as mission failed.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Next run, use rations earlier and avoid trading shots during alert phase.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Snake, security is starting to notice something. Slow down and break their line of sight.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: So it is not a full alert yet.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Right. Crouch, wait for the patrol to turn, or use cover before suspicion reaches alert status.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: They lost direct contact, but the alert is not over. Keep moving and stay out of sight.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I will wait until the search cools down.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: Caution means the enemy is tense. Do not sprint back into their patrol route.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Observe, then move.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: Exactly. Let the meter drain before pushing forward.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Snake, reinforcements are moving into the dock. Avoid a prolonged firefight.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: How many?

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Enough to compromise the mission if you stay exposed. Hide, isolate them, or reach the objective.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, the searchlight does not need a camera lock. If it sweeps over you, suspicion will climb.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Will chaff help?

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: For this simulation, yes. Chaff disrupts the electronic tracking long enough to cross.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Snake, that armored captain is holding the extraction route. Do not try to run past him.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Armor is thick. I will need to keep moving.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Use the gaps after his shots. CQC can stagger him, but it is risky at close range.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Snake, his movement pattern changed. The armor is compromised, but his adrenaline response is spiking.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: So he gets faster when wounded.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Exactly. Do not trade hits. Break line of fire and use the crates as cover.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Good work, Snake. The captain is down and the cargo elevator route is open.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I am heading for extraction.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Stay sharp until the mission clear signal. Reinforcements may still be in the area.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, that object is not part of the main route. It looks like hidden simulation data.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: A collectible?

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Think of it as a codec archive fragment. Find all of them for a cleaner debrief score.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Solid Snake, this is Campbell. Keep the radio open and confirm every objective.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Copy. I will use the frequency memory when I need orders.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: The MSX pack keeps the display minimal: frequency, text, and mission discipline.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: Snake, survival starts before the first shot. Observe patrols before you move.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Old-school rules, then.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: Exactly. Fewer panels, more attention. That is the MSX way.

lines.speaker: kasler
lines.text: Snake, if you meet a mercenary, study the weapon pattern before committing.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Weakness first. Trigger second.

lines.speaker: kasler
lines.text: Good. Boss data should live in this channel later.

lines.speaker: holly
lines.text: The stronghold layout is easier to read if you treat every room as a puzzle.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Any route you recommend?

lines.speaker: holly
lines.text: Check access locks and elevators before wasting ammunition.

lines.speaker: jacobsen
lines.text: Snake, even the environment can become equipment if you understand it.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I thought this was a radio channel.

lines.speaker: jacobsen
lines.text: It is. And every good radio needs one strange expert.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, this line is for technical support and stage guidance.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: You watching the feed?

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: As much as the simulation allows. The MGS2 pack uses cleaner blue panels and priority call rules.

lines.speaker: colonel
lines.text: Raiden, confirm the mission area and proceed according to instructions.

lines.speaker: raiden
lines.text: Understood.

lines.speaker: colonel
lines.text: This visual pack is calibrated for Big Shell style support: clean data, cold colors, precise commands.

lines.speaker: rose
lines.text: Jack, this channel is reserved for saving mission data.

lines.speaker: raiden
lines.text: Save the current simulation state.

lines.speaker: rose
lines.text: Local data is stored by the app save engine. Try not to ignore high-priority CALL signs.

lines.speaker: major_zero
lines.text: Snake, this is Major Zero. Use the radio whenever you need mission guidance.

lines.speaker: big_boss
lines.text: Copy, Major.

lines.speaker: major_zero
lines.text: The MGS3 pack should feel warmer, rougher, and more analog than the Shadow Moses Codec.

lines.speaker: para_medic
lines.text: Snake, this is the save line. Want to record your progress?

lines.speaker: big_boss
lines.text: Go ahead.

lines.speaker: para_medic
lines.text: Simulation state saved locally. Later we can add food, movies, and injury-specific calls.

lines.speaker: para_medic
lines.text: Snake, tell me what you found. Animal? Plant? Wound?

lines.speaker: big_boss
lines.text: Right now, just the radio interface.

lines.speaker: para_medic
lines.text: Then start with the basics: warm field colors, analog signal bars, and survival labels.

lines.speaker: the_boss
lines.text: Jack, equipment is only useful if your body knows what to do with it.

lines.speaker: big_boss
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: the_boss
lines.text: Then build the mission around technique, not just weapons.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, this modern pack is a simulation layer for battlefield support.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Looks cleaner than the old Codec.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: More cinematic, more tactical tags, less monochrome. But the core is still support communication.

lines.speaker: drebin
lines.text: Old Snake, battlefield hardware is all about flow. Supply, ID locks, and timing.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: You selling me something?

lines.speaker: drebin
lines.text: For now, just a future weapon database module.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: Boss, check the iDroid. Mission intel, extraction, and Mother Base data belong in this deck.

lines.speaker: venom_snake
lines.text: Understood.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: No classic Codec frequency here: this pack treats the number as a simulation channel.

lines.speaker: ocelot
lines.text: Boss, keep it flexible. Scout, mark, extract, adapt.

lines.speaker: venom_snake
lines.text: And if things go loud?

lines.speaker: ocelot
lines.text: Then make sure the player had a choice before the alarm.

lines.speaker: vr_instructor
lines.text: Simulation ready. Objective: learn the system before chasing perfect rank.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: What are the rules?

lines.speaker: vr_instructor
lines.text: No excuses. No wasted movement. Score, route, repeat.

lines.speaker: colonel_ai
lines.text: Raiden, the mission is proceeding normally. Disregard the contradiction.

lines.speaker: raiden
lines.text: What contradiction?

lines.speaker: colonel_ai
lines.text: The answer was already saved before the question was asked. Continue the simulation.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, this side simulation is using the tanker layout pack. Rain, narrow decks, and security cameras will make the route less forgiving.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Objective?

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Recover the bulkhead keycard, get through the cargo access lock, and sabotage the commander controlling the exit route.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, they triggered a deck-wide alert. The patrol pattern is going to tighten fast.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I noticed.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Break line of sight. The rain makes visibility unstable, but the searchlights will still catch you if you run straight through.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: That keycard should open the bulkhead lock ahead.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Any surprises?

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Expect cameras near the door. Chaff is your safest opening if you want to preserve a no-alert run.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, your vitals are dropping. Use a ration before you push into the hold.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I can keep moving.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: You can, but one burst from the commander will end the mission. Recover first, then advance.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake? Snake! The signal is flat. Simulation failed.

lines.speaker: system
lines.text: Side Ops note: retry from mission select or use ENTER on the failure scene.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Cargo route clear. Good work, Snake.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Upload the run data.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Done. Ranking, secrets, and alert history are stored locally for this mission pack.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Chaff is scrambling the camera and searchlight controllers. It will not stop human patrols, so keep moving.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Camera feed is down. That helps, but the impact noise may still draw a patrol.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Quiet takedown confirmed. CQC is still your cleanest option when the rain hides your approach.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: They are getting suspicious. Slow down, crouch, or break the sightline before it becomes an alert.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: You are out of direct sight. Stay hidden until their search pattern cools down.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: They are still on caution. The deck route is open, but every guard will react faster now.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Reinforcements are entering from the deck edge. Do not get pinned between them and the commander arena.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Camera cone ahead. You can time the sweep, destroy it, or throw chaff for a safer pass.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: That searchlight is scanning the deck. Crouching helps, but chaff gives you the cleanest window.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, the commander is using a shielded firing pattern. Do not stay in front of him for long.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Weak point?

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Force him to reposition, then punish the recovery window. CQC works, but only if you accept a counter-hit risk.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: His pattern changed. He is firing faster now. Use the crates and avoid trading shots.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Commander neutralized. Cargo hold exit is open.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Heading out.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: You found a hidden tanker archive fragment. I am tagging it for the Tape Deck and Lore database.
